text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Narita Brian and Biwa Hayahide at a ramen
shop.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, that hit the spot.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it was delicious!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Well, I'm going to call it here.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You're going already? Don't you want to let your
food settle first?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, it's you. No, we just happened to both be
here.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Welcome! Let me know when you're ready to
order!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
We've got a special on offer! The Roast Pork
Mountain!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's delicious. Every single bite was so juicy, it was
almost like meat broth.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Aren't you a bit too focused on meat? You even
put all your veggies in my bowl.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Did not.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You did too! I saw you! You need to eat some
vegetables too!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! As long as you enjoyed it, I'm happy!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
If you liked it that much, how about some extra
pork? On the house.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Really?
choice_data_list: Don't you think you've had enough for now?
That's a hard offer to pass up, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...I suppose you're right. Eating too much just will
just slow me down.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I think that's a wise decision. You give
good advice, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch. What a meaningless remark. You're trying
too hard to play the part of big sister.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well, I am your big sister...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hey, Brian! We're not racing back! Slow down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch the amusing exchange between the
sisters, I order myself the Roast Pork Mountain.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...That's what I'm talking about. Gotta finish every
last bite!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's absurd! You're just going to eat the pork
plain?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Why not? Hey, I'll take you up on that extra pork!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Geez.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Phew. That was more than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The owner was so impressed with you that he kept
bringing more...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Are you going to be okay? You've clearly
exceeded the appropriate amount of food for the
day...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's not a problem... In any case... I'll burn it off
running in no time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Narita Brian certainly seems to have had
her fill of roast pork, she may have overdone it...
